# Obrada metala Korzo Sisak

> Metal fabrication company in Sisak, Croatia since 1988. CNC plasma cutting, laser welding, laser cleaning, press brake & tube bending, metal constructions, restoration.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services and capabilities.
- [Services](/services): CNC plasma cutting, laser welding, laser cleaning, bending, machining, metal constructions.
- [From Idea to Product](/idea-to-product): End-to-end workflow from concept through delivery.
- [Restoration](/restoration): Restoration of metal objects and craftsmanship work.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photos of workshop, machines, and completed work.
- [Projects](/projects): Featured completed projects with detail pages.
- [About](/about): Company history since 1988, equipment, and team.
- [Contact](/contact): Address (Kutinska 189, Novo Selo Palanječko, Sisak), phone, email, contact form.
